component-parameters.label: Colour picker
component-parameters.name: colour-picker
component-parameters.helperText: Tap the colour picker to select an RGB value from the array.

component-parameters.label: Date picker
component-parameters.name: date-picker
component-parameters.helperText: We have a date picker with a calendar prompt.

component-parameters.label: Date and Time picker
component-parameters.name: date-and-time-picker
component-parameters.helperText: And a calendar prompt with a timestamp.
Demo from project metadata + local count
component-parameters.name: hridFORM2
component-parameters.label: Thing 2 Human Identifier
Month picker
component-parameters.name: month-picker
component-parameters.helperText: And one to select just the month if that is all you need.

component-parameters.name: radio-with-option-for-other
component-parameters.label: Radio with Option for Other
component-parameters.helperText: If you cannot see you option, select OTHER, tap the icon to the right and enter it as OTHER.

component-parameters.name: radio-button
component-parameters.label: Radio Button
component-parameters.helperText: If you only have a few choices, a Radio button might be the best option

component-parameters.label: Controlled Number
component-parameters.name: controlled-number
component-parameters.helperText: This number must be at least 10 and not more than 20.
You can also select multiple options from the pick list
component-parameters.name: multi-select-field

component-parameters.helperText: Demo from project metadata + local count

component-parameters.helperText: You can select your option from the dropdown
component-parameters.name: select-field
component-parameters.label: Select Field
html-text-3
component-parameters.name: html-text-3
component-parameters.content: ##### html-text-3 You can't synchronise invalid data. FAIMS3 has two main types of validation: required fields and field-level controls.

component-parameters.label: Controlled Text Field
component-parameters.name: controlled-text-field
component-parameters.helperText: If the text does not meet the validation rule you cannot save and sync. This one must be at least 5 characters long.

component-parameters.label: Required Text Field
component-parameters.name: required-text-field
component-parameters.helperText: If no value is entered, you can't save and sync the record.
You can organise your selections into groups with a Hierarchical picklist. You can choose to store the full path, where that's useful.
component-parameters.label: Hierarchical Picker (full path)
component-parameters.name: hierarchical-picker-full-path

component-parameters.helperText: Or just the end value if that is all you need.
component-parameters.label: Hierarchical Picker (only child)
component-parameters.name: hierarchical-picker-full-path-only

component-parameters.label: Thing 2 name
component-parameters.name: thing-2-name
component-parameters.helperText: Give Thing 2 a name or title
Choose a file
component-parameters.name: fileuploader
component-parameters.label: fileuploader

component-parameters.helperText: Click to save current location
component-parameters.label: Take point
component-parameters.name: take-point

component-parameters.helperText: Create zero or more links
component-parameters.name: is-related-to
component-parameters.label: Is related to
Take Photo
component-parameters.name: take-photo
component-parameters.helperText: Take a photo
We can also store multi line Text boxes for when you have a lot of data.
component-parameters.name: multi-line-text
component-parameters.label: Multi line text

component-parameters.helperText: Click or tap to add the current Date and Time
component-parameters.name: date-and-time-now
component-parameters.label: Date and Time NOW

component-parameters.helperText: Select or Add new related record
component-parameters.name: related-thing
component-parameters.label: Related Thing

### html
  • This is an example of included HTML with custom formatting
  • This can also include images

Here have example kittens from placekitten.com

component-parameters.label: html-text-10

component-parameters.label: Take Photo
component-parameters.name: take-photo-2
component-parameters.helperText: Take a photo
Thing 2 can be linked to other Thing 2 records
component-parameters.name: linking-relationships
component-parameters.label: Linking Relationships

component-parameters.name: checkbox
component-parameters.label: Check box
component-parameters.helperText: If you need just one option, you might use a Check box
If the options in the dropdown aren't quite right, you can check the NOT SURE box and/or add a MARGINAL NOTE

component-parameters.helperText: We can also store Email addresses.

html-text-11
component-parameters.name: html-text-11
component-parameters.content: ##### html-text-11 Field-specific validation can be customised in the notebook's json file.

component-parameters.label: Text Field
component-parameters.name: text-field
component-parameters.helperText: We have Text fields.

component-parameters.label: Prepopulated Field
component-parameters.name: text-field-prepop
component-parameters.helperText: This field's default is 'Default'

component-parameters.label: html-text-14
component-parameters.name: html-text-14
component-parameters.content: **html-text-14** By default records are saved as a Draft on your local device. They can only be synchronised once you have selected Save.

component-parameters.helperText: Thing 2 can be the Parent of none or more Thing 1 records
component-parameters.name: parent-child-relationships
component-parameters.label: Parent-Child Relationships

component-parameters.helperText: Select your field here

FORM1SECTION1.label: Input Fields
FORM1SECTION1.description: We can collect data about more than one thing. You decide what it's called, and what information you need to collect about that thing.

FORM1SECTION2.label: Structured Data
FORM1SECTION2.description: We can also store Structured and controlled data.

FORM1SECTION3.label: Metadata
FORM1SECTION3.description: FAIMS3 offers input options for annotation and certain when the options are structured, but the data are fuzzy.

information.purposeMarkdown: This is a demonstration notebook walking through the key features of FAIMS3 Beta.
